latin: Magister ludi crudelis discipulis suis dixit: 'si pilam vitare potes, omnia vitare potes.' tum quinque regulas recitavit: 'vita, inclina, merge, desili, pila!'

questions.target: If you can dodge a ball, you can dodge anything
choices: If you can dodge a ball, you can dodge anything

questions.prompt: How would you describe the coach?

translation: A cruel game coach said to his students: 'If you can dodge a ball, you can dodge anything.' Then he recited five rules: 'Dodge, duck, dip, dive, and dodge!'
